title: Vintage Le Creuset Cast Iron Grill Pan – Made in France
description:
High-quality vintage grill pan from Le Creuset, crafted from durable cast iron and made in France. Designed to deliver excellent grilling results, this pan is perfect for preparing meats, fish, and vegetables with beautiful grill marks while using little fat.
Cast iron ensures even heat distribution and outstanding heat retention, allowing you to sear, grill, and brown foods perfectly at both medium and high temperatures.
Features:
Brand: Le Creuset
Material: Cast iron
Origin: Made in France
Period: Vintage, 1970–1980
Excellent heat distribution and long heat retention
Ideal for grilling meat, fish, and vegetables
Energy-efficient cast iron for optimal cooking results
Compatible with all heat sources, including induction, oven, grill, and barbecue
Easy to use and maintain
Condition:
Very good vintage condition. Please refer to the photos, which form part of the description.
A timeless and durable cookware piece, perfect for everyday cooking or for collectors of classic French kitchenware.
